title: Consolation of Philosophy: Fortune's Wheel
description: Boethius, sentenced to death, is visited by Lady Philosophy. She teaches him that Fortune's gifts were never truly his.
introduction: Boethius, sentenced to death, is visited by Lady Philosophy. She teaches him that Fortune's gifts were never truly his.

translation.text: If Fortune began to stay fixed, she would cease to be Fortune. She is always changing — that is her very nature.
